observations.polarity: Intent as active force vs. Emptiness as passive space
observations.summary: Dan's act of lifting his palm and commanding 'Let it rain' demonstrates the power of intent over the emptiness above, highlighting a tension between active will and passive void.

left_evidence.quote: Dan lifted his palm toward the emptiness above. Intent was enough. "Let it rain."

right_evidence.quote: Dan lifted his palm toward the emptiness above.
